title: Update CTA button text to 'Join Now For Tournament'

requirements.text: In HeroSection.tsx, update the text of the second CTA button (the animated 'Join Now' fire-style button) so that it reads 'Join Now For Tournament'. The element is identified by XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[2]/a[2]/span[4]/span[1]. Only the visible label text should change; all existing animations, styles, and structure must remain intact.

quotes:
Join Now
For Tournament
Ye likho

acceptanceCriteria: The animated CTA button in HeroSection displays the text 'Join Now For Tournament'.
All existing fire-style animations, colors, and button structure remain unchanged.
No other buttons or text elements are affected.

constraints: Only modify the label text of the targeted button element; do not alter its animations, styles, or surrounding markup.
nonGoals: Changing button styling, colors, or animations.
Modifying any other buttons or sections on the page.
